notes: Local-runtime fixture for appRevokeAccessScopes error-code parity. Live conformance probe on harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com succeeded for 2025-01, and safe live probes confirmed UNKNOWN_SCOPES and CANNOT_REVOKE_REQUIRED_SCOPES wording.

Public Admin requests with a valid access token provide source app context, while unauthenticated requests fail before the resolver, so the missing-source-app payload is Core-source-derived rather than real-Shopify-recorded.
Core source contract: AppRevokeScopeError maps non-scope errors, including MISSING_SOURCE_APP, to field id; the missing_source_app i18n message is No app found on the access token.

userErrors.message: No app found on the access token.
